sentences.english: Do you think first impressions are usually accurate?
I think first impressions are sometimes useful but often unreliable.
sentences.korean: 첫인상이 때로는 유용하지만 종종 믿을 수 없다고 생각해요.

sentences.english: We tend to judge people based on superficial cues like their appearance clothing and tone of voice.
sentences.korean: 외모 옷차림 목소리 톤 같은 피상적 단서를 기반으로 사람을 판단하는 경향이 있어요.

sentences.english: But these don't always reflect who a person truly is — someone might seem quiet and unfriendly because they're shy not because they dislike you.
sentences.korean: 하지만 이것이 항상 진짜 모습을 반영하지 않아요 — 조용하고 불친절해 보이는 사람이 싫어서가 아니라 수줍어서일 수 있어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Long Commute vs. Small Apartment Near Work

sentences.english: My best friend in college was someone I initially disliked because he seemed arrogant but once I got to know him he turned out to be the kindest person I've ever met.
sentences.korean: 대학 때 가장 친한 친구는 처음에 거만해 보여서 싫었지만 알고 보니 내가 만난 가장 친절한 사람이었어요.

sentences.english: That experience taught me to always give people a second chance before forming a final opinion.
sentences.korean: 그 경험이 최종 의견을 형성하기 전에 항상 두 번째 기회를 주라고 가르쳐줬어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Would you prefer living in a large house with a lo
Longer Vacations vs. Shorter Frequent Breaks
